name: nikxel-windows
author: nikhildhanda04
description: Nikxel — Your Pixel Desktop Companion for Windows

scripts.dev: tsc && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/style.css dist/renderer/ && cp -r assets dist/ && electron .
scripts.build: tsc && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/style.css dist/renderer/ && electron-builder
